caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" and a green cap, along with headphones. The setting appears to be a well-decorated room with framed photographs on the wall behind him, suggesting a personal or professional space. There are also mannequins dressed in clothing, indicating that the location might be a clothing store or a studio with a fashion-related theme. The man seems engaged and animated, possibly discussing topics related to work or business, as he gestures with his hands while speaking into the microphone. The overall atmosphere is casual yet professional, with a focus on conversation and interaction.
